title: Ban Hammer
description: This mod adds a BAN hammer to Minecraft. A quicker way to BAN those that don't follow the rules of your server.
body:
A mod that adds a ban hammer to Minecraft, but it is command block themed like in the icon.

# **What this mod adds**
This mod adds a ban hammer that has the textures of the command block that allows you to ban players from your server and is helpful if someone is breaking the rules of your server.

**WARNING: The ban hammer will ban you if you use a mob that is not a player.**
